mapper.select: SELECT s.*, u.real_name as user_name FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.user_id = u.id ORDER BY s.start_time DESC
SELECT s.*, u.real_name as user_name FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.user_id = #{userId} ORDER BY s.start_time DESC
SELECT s.*, u.real_name as user_name FROM schedule s LEFT JOIN sys_user u ON s.user_id = u.id WHERE s.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO schedule (user_id, title, content, start_time, end_time) VALUES (#{userId}, #{title}, #{content}, #{startTime}, #{endTime})
mapper.update: UPDATE schedule SET title = #{title}, content = #{content}, start_time = #{startTime}, end_time = #{endTime} WHERE id = #{id}
